cover.subtitle:
견훤·궁예·왕건,
다시 셋으로 나뉘다.
cover.imagePrompt: Later Three Kingdoms illustration, late 9th century. ONE warlord-monk figure (resembling Gungye) in dark robe with shaved head and an iron helmet beside him, standing on a hilltop overlooking burning villages. Background: ruined Silla pagoda silhouette and chaotic plains. Composition: rebellion, brewing storm. Color: storm-gray + crimson + bronze + clay-brown. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

outro.tip_headline:
"공산은 견훤 · 고창은 왕건"
전투의 승자를 외운다.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 공산 전투(927·후백제 우세·신숭겸 전사)와 고창 전투(930·고려 우세·전세 역전)를 헷갈리게 묻는다. 궁예의 국호 변천(후고구려→마진→태봉)과 천도(송악→철원)도 단골 출제 포인트.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized scroll-and-spear icon shown from a slight angle. RIGHT: a small fortress gate silhouette suggesting Cheorwon. Cream #F2EDE3 base + storm-gray #5C5C66 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
